header.style: Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px border-b border-white/10

tutorial_card.style: Neumorphic/Technical mix: flat background, 1px border-white/5, subtle inner glow on hover. No rounded corners, use rounded-md max.

code_block.style: Retro-Futurism: Deep black background #000000, neon syntax highlights, 1px cyan border, copy to clipboard button.

image_urls.description: Cinematic ultra-realistic night street scene, wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, modern graphics mod showcase.
Esports mascot logo of a seagull head (Tête de Mouette).
Macro photography of high-end PC motherboard glowing.
Sleek gaming setup with neon monitors.
Dark gaming laptop with colorful RGB lighting, useful as a fallback for modding tutorials.

motion_accessibility.hover_states: All links and buttons must transition clearly, e.g., text-white to text-cyan-400.
motion_accessibility.entrance_animation: Staggered fade-up for tutorial lists using Framer Motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust layout with a sticky glassmorphism header and pure HTML/Tailwind for structural asymmetry on the landing page.
Use Lucide-react for all icons (e.g., Download, Settings, Monitor, Crosshair, Gamepad).
For the Tutorial Detail pages, implement numbered steps using large typography (e.g., text-4xl font-black text-white/10 for the numbers behind the text).
Implement clear syntax highlighting (or simulated styles) for CitizenFX.ini code blocks with a functional copy button.
Build an Admin Dashboard for 'Créateur' role to manage tutorials, using Shadcn tables and forms. Keep the design cardless and rectangular.
Include a stylized Login page matching the premium gaming brand.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing sections, but highly customized Shadcn for forms, dialogs, and tables.
